# pexip_infinity_diagnostic_graph (Resource)

Manages a diagnostic graph with the Infinity service. Diagnostic graphs provide visual monitoring and troubleshooting capabilities for system health and performance metrics.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "pexip_infinity_diagnostic_graph" "example" {
  title = "CPU Usage Over Time"
  order = 1
}
```


<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `order` (Number) The display order of the diagnostic graph. Lower values appear first.
- `title` (String) The title of the diagnostic graph. Maximum length: 250 characters.

### Optional

- `datasets` (Set of String) List of dataset identifiers to include in this diagnostic graph.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Resource URI for the diagnostic graph in Infinity
- `resource_id` (Number) The resource integer identifier for the diagnostic graph in Infinity
